description: Supply line check. A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any friendly combat unit within one-half (1/2) of that unit's CPA. Distance is measured as though traversed by a medium truck, unless the unit is non-motorized infantry in which case it is traced as infantry movement. The supply line may not be traced through impassable terrain or enemy ZOCs unoccupied by friendly units.

cases.description: Unit CPA=20, path cost=9 to friendly dump, no blocking: max_range=10, 9 <= 10, in supply
cases.rule_clause: A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any Friendly combat unit if it is within one-half (1/2) of that combat unit's CPA

expected.reasoning: path cost 9 <= max_range 10 (CPA 20 / 2), no blocking, friendly dump; unit is in supply per rule 32.16

cases.description: Unit CPA=20, path cost=10 exactly: 10 <= 10, boundary case is in supply
cases.rule_clause: A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any Friendly combat unit if it is within one-half (1/2) of that combat unit's CPA

expected.reasoning: path cost 10 == max_range 10 (CPA 20 / 2); rule says 'within one-half' — exactly at the boundary is still within range

cases.description: Unit CPA=20, path cost=10.5: 10.5 > 10, out of supply
cases.rule_clause: A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any Friendly combat unit if it is within one-half (1/2) of that combat unit's CPA

expected.reasoning: path cost 10.5 > max_range 10.0 (CPA 20 / 2); unit is out of supply range

cases.description: Unit CPA=20, path=9, enemy ZOC on path with no friendly unit to cancel it: supply line blocked
cases.rule_clause: The supply line may not be traced thru impassable terrain or enemy ZOC's unoccupied by Friendly units

expected.reasoning: enemy ZOC on path is unoccupied by a friendly unit; supply line may not be traced through it per rule 32.16

cases.description: Unit CPA=20, path=9, enemy ZOC on path but a friendly unit occupies that hex (ZOC cancelled): in supply
cases.rule_clause: The supply line may not be traced thru impassable terrain or enemy ZOC's unoccupied by Friendly units

expected.reasoning: enemy ZOC hex on path is occupied by a friendly unit, which negates the ZOC per rule 10.26; supply line may be traced through; unit is in supply

cases.description: Unit CPA=20, path=9, impassable terrain on the only available path: supply line blocked
cases.rule_clause: The supply line may not be traced thru impassable terrain or enemy ZOC's unoccupied by Friendly units

expected.reasoning: impassable terrain on the only path blocks supply line tracing per rule 32.16

cases.description: Unit CPA=20, path=9, dump is a dummy (decoy) counter: in_supply=false, dummy dumps cannot supply units
cases.rule_clause: Players may use dummy Supply Units to confuse their opponent(s) [rule 32.18]; removed upon discovery

expected.reasoning: dummy Supply Units carry no actual supply; they cannot be drawn upon; unit is out of supply

cases.description: Unit CPA=20, path=9, dump belongs to the enemy (dump_is_friendly=false): in_supply=false
cases.rule_clause: A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any Friendly combat unit if it is within one-half (1/2) of that combat unit's CPA

expected.reasoning: rule 32.16 specifies 'Friendly' Supply Unit; an enemy dump does not satisfy this requirement

cases.description: Non-motorized infantry, CPA=10, path=4 (traced as infantry movement): max_range=5, 4 <= 5, in supply
cases.rule_clause: The distance is calculated from the unit to the Supply Unit as though it is being traversed by a medium Truck unless the unit is a non-motorized infantry unit in which case it is traced as infantry movement

expected.reasoning: non-motorized infantry unit traces supply as infantry movement; CPA=10, max_range=5; path 4 <= 5, in supply

cases.description: Non-motorized infantry, CPA=10, path=5 exactly: 5 <= 5, at boundary, in supply
cases.rule_clause: A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any Friendly combat unit if it is within one-half (1/2) of that combat unit's CPA

expected.reasoning: path cost 5 == max_range 5 (CPA 10 / 2); exactly at boundary, still in supply

cases.description: Non-motorized infantry, CPA=10, path=6: 6 > 5, out of supply
cases.rule_clause: A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any Friendly combat unit if it is within one-half (1/2) of that combat unit's CPA

expected.reasoning: path cost 6 > max_range 5 (CPA 10 / 2); unit is out of supply range

cases.description: Unit in the same hex as the friendly dump (path cost=0): in supply
cases.rule_clause: A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any Friendly combat unit if it is within one-half (1/2) of that combat unit's CPA

expected.reasoning: unit is co-located with the dump (path cost 0); trivially within half CPA range; in supply

cases.description: Unit CPA=0: max_range=0, no dump can be reached; unit is out of supply
cases.rule_clause: A Supply Unit may be drawn upon by any Friendly combat unit if it is within one-half (1/2) of that combat unit's CPA

expected.reasoning: CPA=0 means half-CPA=0; even a co-located dump cannot be drawn upon because no CPA has been assigned; unit is out of supply

cases.note: The rule derives max_range as CPA/2. With CPA=0, max_range=0. The rule 32.16 example in the text cites 'a non-motorized infantry unit would have to be within 5 CP's' (CPA=10, half=5), confirming the formula.
